ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the candidate */,
  "election_history" TEXT /* Election history of the candidate */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electoral_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral district */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the electoral district */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Boundary description or coordinates of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the district */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the election (local, state, national) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total votes cast in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the election */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the electoral district */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total votes received by the candidate */,
  "swing" REAL /* Swing percentage for the candidate */,
  "previous_result_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the previous election result (for swing calculation) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user who entered or updated the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting pattern */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the election */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the electoral district */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the voting pattern */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Turnout percentage */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of voters */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of voters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level for the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_finance" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign finance record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the campaign finance */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the campaign */,
  "donations_received" REAL /* Total donations received by the campaign */,
  "donation_sources" TEXT /* Sources of donations */,
  "expenditures" TEXT /* Expenditures details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id")
)
